chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 36 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.926/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.927/2024. 26.03.2026 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, same is taken on record. Matter is pending since 2024 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that applicant has made no effort to have the matter listed for past two years. Even today, learned counsel merely seeks time for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
